overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic city. The player moves along elevated walkways, descends stairs through landscaped areas, and explores neon-lit streets before looking up at the sun from an underpass. The scene features a mix of natural vegetation and cyberpunk architecture with bright sunlight and reflective wet surfaces.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated walkway past seated individuals

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench facing away from camera
second person sitting on bench with colorful shoes

entered.detail: reflective wet tiled surface of the elevated walkway
black metal railing with wooden handrail along the walkway edge
tall dark building with illuminated 'D' logo and 'DELAMAIN' text
tall palm trees lining the right side of the walkway
metal benches with people seated along the left wall
towering glass and steel buildings with billboards in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated pedestrian walkway with wet reflective pavement. The camera moves forward past benches where people are seated, with the distinctive Delamain building visible on the right. Palm trees and futuristic skyscrapers frame the scene under bright morning sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching stair descent on elevated walkway

events.description: approaching the stair descent at the end of the walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the walkway approaching the stairs

entered.detail: concrete stairs leading down to lower level becoming visible ahead
thick green bushes and trees lining the right side near the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the elevated walkway as the Delamain building looms larger on the right. The benches fall behind as the approach to a stair descent becomes visible, with denser vegetation appearing on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor stair descent through landscaped area

events.description: beginning descent down the concrete stairs
reaching the bottom of the stairs entering the lower plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking down the stairs following a woman and child

notable_agents.action: woman in green skirt walking down the stairs ahead
child running ahead of the woman down the stairs

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with red-brown side walls descending to lower level
metal railing along the left side of the stair descent
elevated highway or monorail track visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera descends a wide concrete staircase surrounded by dense vegetation and trees. Following a woman and child down the steps, the Delamain building recedes into the distance while an overhead bridge structure becomes visible ahead. The lighting becomes more diffused under the tree canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower pedestrian walkway with neon signage

events.description: neon signs and advertisements becoming visible on surrounding buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the lower walkway with neon signs visible on the right

entered.detail: bright pink and blue neon signs on the buildings including Japanese characters
white steam rising from vents near the overhead bridge
futuristic buildings with illuminated advertisements and geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: Having reached the bottom of the stairs, the camera moves along a lower walkway lined with palm trees. Neon signs and cyberpunk architecture become prominent on the right, with steam vents visible in the distance. The overhead bridge spans across the scene as the environment transitions to a more urban neon-lit area.

events.description: entering the dark shadow of the concrete overpass
tilting camera upward to look at the sun through the overpass gap

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the sun creating a lens flare effect

entered.detail: dark concrete underside of the highway or monorail structure
bright sun with lens flare effect visible through the gap in the overpass

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dark underpass beneath the concrete overpass structure. The scene transitions dramatically from the neon-lit street to shadow. The camera then tilts upward to frame the bright sun through a gap in the overpass, creating a prominent lens flare and rainbow light effects.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, elevated pedestrian walkway down into a shadowed urban underpass. It begins by gliding across wet, reflective pavement past seated pedestrians and palm trees, with the Delamain building looming on the right under a clear morning sun. As the camera moves forward, the open walkway gives way to a wide concrete staircase where the lighting becomes diffused beneath a canopy of dense vegetation. The scene then shifts to a lower urban level lined with neon signs and steam vents, moving beneath a massive overhead bridge as the architecture becomes more industrial. Finally, the camera enters the deep shadow of a dark underpass before tilting upward to frame the brilliant sun through a gap in the concrete, creating a vivid lens flare and rainbow light effects.
